## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of what and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] If I changed German text/vocabulary, I verified grammar, gender, and spelling
- [ ] Resources/links I added are real, free, and reputable
- [ ] I did not add a backend, accounts, trackers, or analytics
- [ ] I did not add new dependencies (or I explained why one is needed below)
